title: Extramarks is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Extramarks is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Extramarks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Extramarks:
Extramarks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
